violations.text: ( Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

ROP fish was observed thawing with package still intact. PIC voluntarily disposed of fish that was out of temperature. Fish that was observed in temperature was taken out of package for proper ROP thawing procedures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Working containers of (dry ingredients and spices ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
(Stove burner knobs and refrigeration units handles ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Observed covered and/or wrapped in tape. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the (al refrigeration units, stove hoods, and prep table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and/or clutter were observed in the (back storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Raw animal foods (raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (condiments and beverages) in the cookline prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves in the kitchen ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen under 3 bay sink and equipment have an accumulation of soil residue ,food debris, and grease/soil buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The lighting in the sushi prep unit is in poor repair. Light intensity is low and/or not working. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged tuna was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler with the packaging still intact. ROP seafood must be reintroduced to air prior to thawing. Food was observed at 38 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Packages were opened during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2023
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023

The following areas were observed in poor repair: 1. Caulking at 3 bay sink in sushi prep area (correct by 09/22/2023) 2. Ceiling in the kitchen, some areas observed in poor repair with peeling paint (correct by 08/22/2024). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
